---
title: "Excel Course Material"
description: "Downloadable PDF and Excel files."
image: "../../../images/Excel_Logo.jpg"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-block}
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Excel Grundlagen
Excel Grundlagen: Formeln - Formatierung - Datenanalyse

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3}
![PDF Preview](../../../files/Excel_Grundlagen_preview.jpg){.border .rounded .mb-3}

[Download PDF](../../../files/Excel_Grundlagen.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Excel Aufgaben
Excel Aufgaben und Übungen zur Vertiefung der Grundlagen

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3}
![Excel Preview](../../../files/Excel_Aufgaben_preview.jpg){.border .rounded .mb-3}
    
[Download Excel](../../../files/Excel_Aufgaben.xlsx){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::::
:::
